name: Retrieve Data from Timeseries Database
title: Retrieve Data from Timeseries Database
description:
get_latest_data_service is an MCP-accessible retrieval tool that returns the most recent operational telemetry across all connected FlowFuse projects and remote instances, providing a unified real-time view of enterprise signals organized in a hierarchical namespace (for example enterprise/site/device/topic). 

When invoked, the tool generates a distributed query and broadcasts it to all linked runtime environments via project links, ensuring that the freshest per-topic values are collected regardless of where the data originates. 

A request–response correlation layer assigns each invocation a UUID, caches the originating MCP request, and merges asynchronous replies from remote instances before returning a single consolidated response to the MCP broker. 

The tool is read-only, idempotent from a data-state perspective, and designed to serve as a “single source of truth” access point for AI agents and applications that need current cross-site industrial data without needing to know the physical location, protocol, or storage backend of the underlying signals.

name: Cache and release on reply
Get Current Weather
title: Get Current Weather (Open-Meteo)
description: Fetch current weather from Open-Meteo for a named location (San Francisco, Reno, Chicago, Dallas) or for explicit latitude and longitude. Returns current conditions and a compact summary suitable for FlowFuse Expert.

name: Resolve coords and build Open-Meteo URL
Format response for MCP
Site Manager Message
title: Site Manager Message
description: A prompt that allows the agent to create a message to the site manager.
template: You are writing a letter to ask a site manager to check on a site. {{sitemanagername}} is the name of the manager of this site. Be formal but polite.
